{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Engineer's drones
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] has access to [[Engineer's drones]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
